issues.description: Trigger is OnPlay but card text describes optional effect with cost (return 2 cards from trash). Should use Activated trigger for optional effects with costs.

Action type is TrashFromHand but effect returns cards FROM trash TO deck, then adds card from trash to hand. TrashFromHand is incorrect. Should be ReturnToHand for the secondary action and a custom return-to-deck action for the cost.
Filter references 'Thriller Bark Pirates' but excludes Dr. Hogback. The effect should search trash for Thriller Bark Pirates type card excluding Dr. Hogback, not trash from hand.
FlipLife is incorrect action. Effect should ReturnToHand the filtered card, not flip life. The cost (return 2 cards from trash to deck) is not represented at all.
Missing cost representation: player may return 2 cards from trash to deck bottom as a cost to enable the benefit (add 1 Thriller Bark Pirates card from trash to hand, excluding Dr. Hogback).
